request.title: 🔔  Ticket Close Request
request.description:
🔔 The ticket staff has requested to close this ticket.

**Do you want this ticket to be closed?**
request.footer: Only the ticket owner can respond

agreed.title: ✅  Close Request Accepted
agreed.description: ✅ The ticket owner has agreed to close the ticket.
agreed.footer: The ticket will now be closed

declined.title: ❌  Close Request Declined
declined.description: ❌ The ticket owner still needs help and declined the close request.
